input.user_input: Does this software licensing agreement grant the licensee the right to sublicense? Where in the document does it say that?

actual: Please provide or upload the software licensing agreement you would like me to review. Once you provide the document, I will analyze it to determine whether it grants the licensee the right to sublicense and identify exactly where that provision is located.
